summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated PRs are kept independently for maintainer review or later focused processing; no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is planned. Five job candidates were not hydrated in the preflight artifact, so only those specific refs need fresh live state before classification.
